title: Skeleton
description: A loading placeholder component that mimics the shape of content while data is being fetched or processed.
summary: A placeholder UI used to indicate loading states by imitating content structure.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Skeleton` works.

<SkeletonDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Skeleton` component.

<SkeletonDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

| Styles API  | Type      | Default | Annotation                                    |
| ----------- | --------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?` | `boolean` | `false` | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |

### Props API

```ts
type Size = ((string & {}) | number) | { h?: CSSProperties["height"]; w?: CSSProperties["width"] };
```

| Props API  | Type                            | Default             | Annotation                                                                                       |
| ---------- | ------------------------------- | ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| visible`?` | `boolean`                       | `true`              | Determines whether Skeleton overlay should be displayed.                                         |
| size`?`    | `Size`                          | `{h: auto, w:100%}` | Skeleton `height`, numbers are converted to rem.                                                 |
| circle`?`  | `boolean`                       | `false`             | If set, Skeleton `width` and `border-radius` are equal to its `height`                           |
| round`?`   | `CSSProperties["borderRadius"]` | `16`                | Key of `theme.radius` or any valid CSS value to set border-radius. Numbers are converted to rem. |
| animate`?` | `boolean`                       | `true`              | Determines whether Skeleton should be animated.                                                  |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="skeleton" />

import { rem } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
import { PolymorphicSlot } from "@/ui/polymorphic-slot";\r
\r
type CSSProperties = React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
type ComponentProps<T extends React.ElementType, Exclude extends string = never> = React.PropsWithoutRef<Omit<React.ComponentProps<T>, "style" | "color" | Exclude>>;\r
\r
interface __SkeletonProps {\r
  visible?: boolean;\r
  size?:\r
    | ((string & {}) | number)\r
    | {\r
        h?: CSSProperties["height"];\r
        w?: CSSProperties["width"];\r
      };\r
  circle?: boolean;\r
  round?: CSSProperties["borderRadius"];\r
  animate?: boolean;\r
  color?: React.CSSProperties["color"];\r
  unstyled?: boolean;\r
  className?: string;\r
  style?: CSSProperties;\r
  asChild?: boolean;\r
}\r
export interface SkeletonProps extends ComponentProps<"div">, __SkeletonProps {\r
  asChild?: boolean;\r
}\r
\r
export const Skeleton = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, SkeletonProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { visible, size, circle, round, animate = true, color, className, style, unstyled, role = "status", asChild, ...props } = _props;\r
  const Component = asChild ? PolymorphicSlot : "div";\r
  return <Component {...{ ref, role, ...getStyles({ visible, size, circle, round, animate, color, className, style, unstyled, asChild }), ...props }} />;\r
});\r
Skeleton.displayName = "Skeleton";\r
\r
type Options = __SkeletonProps;\r
function getStyles(options: Options = {}) {\r
  const { visible, size, circle, round = 8, animate, color, className, style, unstyled, asChild } = options;\r
\r
  return {\r
    className: cn(\r
      !unstyled && [\r
        "relative flex items-center justify-center rounded-[--skeleton-round]",\r
        circle || typeof size === "object" ? "size-[--skeleton-size,auto] min-h-[--skeleton-size,auto] min-w-[--skeleton-size,auto]" : "h-[var(--skeleton-size,var(--skeleton-h,auto))] w-[var(--skeleton-size,var(--skeleton-w,100%))]",\r
        visible ? "pointer-events-none overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:z-[19] before:content-[''] after:absolute after:inset-0 after:z-[21] after:bg-muted after:content-['']" : "before:transition-colors after:transition-colors",\r
        { "before:bg-[--skeleton-color,hsl(var(--background))] after:animate-pulse": animate && visible },\r
        { "min-w-[var(--skeleton-size,var(--skeleton-h,auto))] min-h-[var(--skeleton-size,var(--skeleton-h,auto))]": asChild }\r
      ],\r
      className\r
    ),\r
    style: {\r
      ...(typeof size === "object" ? { "--skeleton-h": rem(size.h), "--skeleton-w": rem(size.w) } : { "--skeleton-size": rem(size) }),\r
      "--skeleton-color": color,\r
      "--skeleton-round": circle ? "9999px" : round === undefined ? undefined : rem(round),\r
      transform: "translateZ(0)",\r
      WebkitTransform: "translateZ(0)",\r
      ...style\r
    }\r
  };\r
